name: MEDIOEVO Agent Ops Pack
description:
Premium templates and release checklists for shipping public-safe agent products while keeping private runtime, IP and credentials out of the package.

Includes: agent technical card, curator report template, ActionGate checklist, GitHub release checklist, Gumroad listing template, synthetic audit example and support notes.

Excludes: private Claudio runtime, MEDIOEVO books, RPG, TCG, assets, lore, credentials, account sessions, customer data, and high-risk scientific, medical, legal, security or revenue promises.
